nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker build that packages the FusionAL FastAPI gateway into a minimal Python 3.11 slim image, running as a non-root user on port 8009 via uvicorn.
nodes.languageNotes: Creates a dedicated non-root user (appuser, UID 5678) and transfers ownership of /app before switching — a security hardening pattern that prevents container privilege escalation.
